promotedShows.name: Chamatkari Boyfriend
promotedShows.description: A dramatic tale of love, power, betrayal and hidden miracles, where an ordinary coder’s life collides with his powerful CEO’s destiny.

promotedShows.name: Jhaduwala bana Doctor
promotedShows.description: Aarav Mehra, a brilliant surgeon hiding behind a janitor’s uniform, risks everything to save lives in a corrupt hospital where prejudice runs deep. As he battles to keep his true identity secret, his compassion and skill ignite a revolution no one saw coming.

promotedShows.name: Secret Shaadi
promotedShows.description: A poor girl marries a cold CEO for her father’s treatment, hiding identity as love slowly blossoms.

promotedShows.name: Mission Mars: Biwi Ka Dhoka
promotedShows.description: A neglected husband-astronaut leaves for Mars, while his manipulative wife realizes too late his true love.

promotedShows.name: Boss Baby
promotedShows.description: A mystical immortal reborn as a baby protects his parents, battling dark forces, power struggles, and destiny.

promotedShows.name: Biwi ka Hatyara
promotedShows.description: A heartbroken cop investigates brutal murder, unaware victim is his pregnant wife’s ghost.

promotedShows.name: Pyaar Ke Teen Vaar
promotedShows.description: A loyal dad is pushed to the edge when his powerful wife uses love, lies, and office politics to crush him—until his daughter gives her mother just three chances to win them back.

promotedShows.name: Pyaar ya Vyapaar ?
promotedShows.description: A forced marriage turns into unexpected love as hidden pasts, secrets, and rival lovers threaten their fragile relationship.

promotedShows.name: Missing Millionaire
promotedShows.description: A humble amnesiac waiter rediscovers he’s the lost hotel tycoon father, reclaiming family, empire, and legacy.

promotedShows.name: Teen Dulhan, Ek Bechara
promotedShows.description: A pizza boy wakes in ancient India, wins hearts, invents weapons, and becomes a hero saving kingdoms.

promotedShows.name: Bhaari thi, ab Bhaari padungi
promotedShows.description: Dumped, disgraced, and broken by her cruel husband and his mistress, Maddy transforms into the stunning Meher Raichand to infiltrate his world and burn it down from within.

promotedShows.name: Tum Tak
promotedShows.description: A mysterious girl’s hidden past, love, betrayal, and a life-saving secret that changes everyone’s destiny forever.

promotedShows.name: Ex-Pati Crorepati
promotedShows.description: After divorce and betrayal, a broke man unlocks a mysterious system, rising through stock and forex mastery.

promotedShows.name: Ek Mazdoor Ki Udaan
promotedShows.description: A fallen Air Force hero regains identity, battles betrayal, and rises again to protect love and honor.

promotedShows.name: Batterywala CEO
promotedShows.description: Abandoned by his wife, a humble inventor returns as a billionaire, shattering greed and reclaiming his legacy.

promotedShows.name: Vada Pav Vaala Billionaire
promotedShows.description: A billionaire hides his identity, marries a struggling girl, and fights society to protect love.

promotedShows.name: Mr. X
promotedShows.description: A beggar with hidden divine healing powers saves a billionaire’s dying daughter, exposing his true identity and destiny.

promotedShows.name: Kyuki Main Mard Hoon?
promotedShows.description: Sushant, a man trapped in a toxic marriage fights back after being emotionally and financially devastated by his manipulative wife, Anjana. With the help of a compassionate lawyer, Meera, he challenges gender bias and seeks justice in a system blind to male victimhood.

promotedShows.name: CEO ka Swayamvar
promotedShows.description: A powerful CEO falls for a wronged waitress, sparking love, revenge, and redemption amid betrayal, secrets, and family conspiracies.

promotedShows.name: Naqaab Mein Nawab
promotedShows.description: A poor cleaner unknowingly marries a secret billionaire in disguise, uncovering family betrayal, revenge, and true love.

promotedShows.name: Collector Aaya Badla Lene
promotedShows.description: Betrayed and broken, Ravi rises from ashes to become an IAS officer, seeking justice.

promotedShows.name: Anadi to Khiladi
promotedShows.description: Betrayed and framed, Siddharth gets a second chance in time to reclaim power and revenge.

promotedShows.name: Chaiwala Billionaire
promotedShows.description: A humble chaiwala discovers hidden inheritance, battles betrayal, and rises as billionaire CEO seeking justice and love.

promotedShows.name: Pyaar Ka X-Ray
promotedShows.description: A struggling taxi driver gains mysterious x-ray vision powers, entering a dangerous world of antiques, secrets, curses, and destiny.

promotedShows.name: Ghar Jamai Godfather
promotedShows.description: A seemingly henpecked husband hides a powerful secret, balancing family humiliation, love, and an explosive double life.

promotedShows.name: Superbhai
promotedShows.description: A betrayed young man gains a supernatural lottery system, powerful divine sisters, and rises to crush enemies seeking revenge and redemption.

promotedShows.name: Mere Looser Papa
promotedShows.description: A heartbreaking tale of neglected love, betrayal, sacrifice, and a father’s silent battle between family and duty.

promotedShows.name: Saiyya Superstar
promotedShows.description: A struggling musician rises from heartbreak and betrayal to fame, rediscovering love, music, and true identity.

promotedShows.name: Kiss KisKo Fix Karoon
promotedShows.description: A small-town repairman gains mysterious powers, fixes anything for money, and gets trapped in love, danger, and crime.

promotedShows.name: Ek fauji ka badla
promotedShows.description: A proud army officer returns after years to propose to his love, only to be insulted and rejected for his modest identity—unaware he is secretly India’s wealthiest king and CEO. Determined to reclaim his honor, he partners with a powerful businesswoman, setting the stage for revenge, revelation, and an epic battle of love and ego.

promotedShows.name: Ferrari Wali Bhikhari
promotedShows.description: A poor beggar girl secretly tests humanity, only to reveal she’s the billionaire CEO everyone once humiliated.

promotedShows.name: Papa Mere Hero
promotedShows.description: A cab driver hiding a billionaire identity saves a runaway heiress, unaware she’ll return years later with their daughter.

promotedShows.name: Bhikari Bana Dulha
promotedShows.description: A fallen tycoon returns in disguise, testing humanity, reclaiming love, and shocking all as a hidden billionaire

promotedShows.name: Jhakaas Jamai
promotedShows.description: A heartfelt story of a devoted father who rises from humiliation to power, protecting his family fiercely.

promotedShows.name: Kiraye Ka Dulha
promotedShows.description: A village doctor’s search for his fiancée pulls him into dangerous conspiracies, forbidden love, and survival.

promotedShows.name: Plane Crash ka Doshi Kaun?
promotedShows.description: In this aviation thriller, a pilot, her lover, and an ATC officer face betrayal mid-flight until a supernatural twist changes everything.

promotedShows.name: Doctor Genius
promotedShows.description: A genius surgeon fired by politics joins a rival hospital, igniting a dramatic medical battle of revenge and ambition.

promotedShows.name: Sweeper Bana Shehenshah
promotedShows.description: A fallen prince turned sweeper hides royal identity, battles betrayal, finds love, and reclaims destiny fearlessly.

promotedShows.name: Mimi Ka Mission
promotedShows.description: A forgotten billionaire discovers his daughter, who bravely reunites broken parents while fighting betrayal, injustice, and redemption.

promotedShows.name: Ek Raat Ek Raaz
promotedShows.description: A betrayed woman's journey from heartbreak and humiliation to courage, motherhood, and unexpected love — where every betrayal leads her closer to her true strength.

promotedShows.name: Zindagi Dobara
promotedShows.description: A betrayed woman battles illness, deceit, and love to reclaim her identity and justice.

promotedShows.name: Call Girl Bani Maa
promotedShows.description: The emotional journey of a trafficked girl who finds refuge in a billionaire's home and becomes a mother figure to his daughter. As love and trust grow, she must confront a dangerous past to protect the new life she's built.

promotedShows.name: Secret Shehzada
promotedShows.description: A humble salesman’s fake romance spirals into war, revealing his secret heirship to a billion-dollar empire.

promotedShows.name: Cook Ka Badla - Swaad Anusar
promotedShows.description: Fired and humiliated before New Year’s Eve, master chef Vikas Kapoor rises from betrayal to glory when his food wins hearts at a rival hotel. As his enemies crumble, his comeback is Served Swaad Anusaar.

promotedShows.name: Yamlok Express
promotedShows.description: Poor Ronak dies accidentally, bribes Yamlok, returns alive rich, exposes betrayal, fights destiny and love.

promotedShows.name: Super Teacher
promotedShows.description: A fallen teacher gains mysterious powers to transform failing students into champions while battling rivals and love.

promotedShows.name: Dilwale ki Diwali
promotedShows.description: A hidden arms tycoon, mistaken as salesman, battles greed, betrayal and love amid power struggles.

promotedShows.name: Dabangg Damaad
promotedShows.description: A poor son-in-law returns to take revenge, uncovering secrets that turn humiliation into power and destiny.

promotedShows.name: Bhai Ka Dhokha
promotedShows.description: Two brothers torn by jealousy, betrayal, and a father’s mistrust struggling between love, family, and survival.

promotedShows.name: Beta No. 1
promotedShows.description: A powerful tale of a devoted son battling betrayal, greed, and humiliation to protect his mother’s dignity and honor.

promotedShows.name: Kachrawala Bana CEO
promotedShows.description: A scrap collector raises two orphan girls, faces betrayal, and is revealed as a powerful CEO.

promotedShows.name: Ek Raat Do Baarat
promotedShows.description: After one dangerous night, runaway Siya’s pregnancy forces soldier Veer into a duty-bound marriage that slowly becomes love.

promotedShows.name: Dangerous Vijay
promotedShows.description: A wronged man gains mystical power to destroy corrupt elites and reclaim justice, family, and honor.

promotedShows.name: Secret Surgeon
promotedShows.description: A genius surgeon disguises himself as a hospital cleaner to expose corruption and save lives with extraordinary medical skill.

promotedShows.name: Ek Raat Ki Raani
promotedShows.description: A single mother’s past resurfaces when her son’s truth collides with a billionaire’s hidden pain.

promotedShows.name: Kidney Bechi Dil Nahi
promotedShows.description: As cancer drains his final days, a brilliant young man secretly sacrifices his future to save the crumbling empire of the woman he loves — letting her believe he abandoned her. Reduced to delivering food to survive, he’s mocked and broken by the world . Yet when the truth emerges — it unleashes a storm of guilt, love, and ruthless redemption for everyone who failed him.

promotedShows.name: Kadhai Ki Ladai
promotedShows.description: A modern man time-travels to ancient India, using future cooking skills to rise from poverty to power.

promotedShows.name: Baba Ji Ki JadiBooti
promotedShows.description: A loyal husband’s secret military identity collides with a reality show exposing hidden truths and relationships.

promotedShows.name: Illegal Ishq
promotedShows.description: A fiery love story between a rebellious young woman and her father’s dangerous best friend, tangled in secrets, tension, and forbidden attraction.

promotedShows.name: BigBoss Biwi
promotedShows.description: A forbidden love triangle filled with secrets, obsession, betrayal and a sudden twist of destiny between mismatched worlds.

promotedShows.name: Pati ही Parmeshwar
promotedShows.description: A reluctant immortal discovers his divine identity while protecting his love, challenging gods, villains, and destiny itself.

promotedShows.name: Jhukega Nahi Saala
promotedShows.description: A humble waiter hides his billionaire heir identity, rising to power for love, betrayal, and redemption.

promotedShows.name: Punarjanam Ho Na Ho
promotedShows.description: Reincarnated delivery boy regains cosmic powers to reclaim throne, defeat betrayal, and challenge gods across three realms.

promotedShows.name: Topper Ka Badla
promotedShows.description: A wrongfully accused girl battles betrayal, uncovers family secrets, rises as a topper, and reclaims justice with love.

promotedShows.name: Miss Gao Bani Miss Wow
promotedShows.description: A poor village girl discovers she’s a lost heiress, facing betrayal, secrets, and unexpected true love.

promotedShows.name: Naqli Waaris Asli Badla
promotedShows.description: Framed for murder, Abhay battles betrayal, lost love, and family secrets to reclaim his true legacy.

promotedShows.name: Unknown calling
promotedShows.description: A delivery boy receives mysterious future messages that expose betrayal, uncover danger, and transform his destiny.

promotedShows.name: Maut Ka Saudagar
promotedShows.description: A young man, reborn as Don David, returns to avenge his family’s brutal murder and reclaim justice.

promotedShows.name: 300 kilo ka jhooth
promotedShows.description: A greedy woman kidnaps a billionaire’s wife, undergoes surgery to impersonate her, and spirals into chaos, lies, and revenge.

promotedShows.name: DaDaji Ka Online Romance
promotedShows.description: A thousand-year-old ascetic secretly dates a modern woman, sparking comic chaos, family drama, superpowers, and generational clashes.

promotedShows.name: Maa ka Badla Baap Se
promotedShows.description: Karan, the illegitimate son cast aside by the powerful Abhiraj Irani, returns determined to bring his father to his knees. Using cunning and unrelenting ambition, he outsmarts Abhiraj’s loyal heir, Arjun, and draws Devika into his web of vengeance. But as Karan dismantles the empire that denied him, he grapples with the burden of betrayal, the pull of forbidden love, and the question of whether he is becoming the very man he despises.

promotedShows.name: Behenji Nahi, Boss Hu
promotedShows.description: Kavya, a betrayed wife, is diagnosed with terminal cancer, who rises from heartbreak to reclaim her power and expose the lies around her. In a world rigged against her, she chooses revenge over remission — rewriting her destiny one bold step at a time.

promotedShows.name: My Son Is a Bastard
promotedShows.description: Betrayed by his adoptive family and used by the woman he loved, Nishant walks away from a life of pain—only to rise stronger with a new identity and a new family.

promotedShows.name: Gangs Of Bombay
promotedShows.description: A gritty Bombay underworld tale where fearless labourer Chandan outsmarts dons, defies fate, and rises into power.

promotedShows.name: Project MEERA
promotedShows.description: Neglected by her family, Meera enters a thirty-year sleep experiment, leaving them to face devastating regret.

promotedShows.name: Ek Chehra Do Pehchaan
promotedShows.description: A powerful tale of twin brothers battling corruption, reclaiming dignity, and exposing ruthless politicians to save family honor.

promotedShows.name: Bewafa Kaun?
promotedShows.description: After signing divorce papers, Priya rebuilds her life while arrogant CEO Rohit realizes his love too late.

promotedShows.name: Sautela Pyaar
promotedShows.description: A fearless orphan battles stigma, betrayal, and forbidden love while uncovering truth, loyalty, and her own strength.

promotedShows.name: Takht Ki Taaqat
promotedShows.description: A tale of betrayal, love, and power where hidden identities shatter families within India’s elite council.

promotedShows.name: Gumshuda
promotedShows.description: A jealous husband, missing wife, and hidden crime unravel dark secrets, obsession, and deadly truth.

promotedShows.name: Jasoos Biwi
promotedShows.description: In a vintage resale store, betrayal, secrets, and power games unravel between wives, lovers, and enemies.

promotedShows.name: Laapata Biwi
promotedShows.description: A betrayed wife’s tragic love sparks revenge, madness, rebirth, and karmic justice.

promotedShows.name: Market Ka Raja
promotedShows.description: A disguised billionaire protects his son, destroys arrogant enemies, and helps a betrayed entrepreneur reclaim her power.

promotedShows.name: Aakhri Jung
promotedShows.description: A mother seeks justice for her drowned son, battling lies, betrayal, and powerful elites protecting the guilty

promotedShows.name: Sandook Se Nikla Samraat
promotedShows.description: A young actress discovers a magical trunk linking her fate to a warrior emperor across time.

shows.name: Warrior Reborn
shows.description: Little girl dares challenge all, secretly the reborn God of War in disguise.

shows.name: Accidental Night, Fated Love
shows.description: One wrong step opens her heart, when the man she met becomes her company’s CEO.

shows.name: From Remedy To Romance
shows.description: A delivery girl becomes the CEO's antidote, and he unexpectedly falls in love with her at first sight.

shows.name: From Begger to Billionaire

shows.description: Qin Mo hides his true identity as a chairman, testing kindness while secretly funding lives and protecting love.
